---
title: "Jocelyn Cramer"
subtitle: |
  Master's Student in Watershed Science  
  Colorado State University  

  Future Ph.D. Student (Fall 2026)

image: www/me.jpg

about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/jocelynmcramer

    - text: Email
      href: mailto:jocelyn.cramer@colostate.edu
---

[**Education:**]{.underline}

Alaska Pacific University

-   B.S. Environmental Science

-   B.A. Outdoor Studies

Colorado State University

-   *Master's in Watershed Science* (Graduation Summer 2026)

[**Experience:**]{.underline}

-   Laboratory + Research Technician at the University of Alaska Anchorage

-   Ecologist for the U.S. Fish & Wildlife

-   TA for BZ474 Stream Ecology and Biology

-   TA for NR319 Introduction to Geospatial Science

-   TA for NR220 Natural Resource Ecology and Measurements
